channel.title: Video-Conferencing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Video-Conferencing on Pi Stack

item.title: BigBlueButton vs MiroTalk: Best Self-Hosted Video Conferencing 2026
item.description: Video conferencing has become essential for education, business, and remote collaboration. Yet commercial platforms like Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Google Meet collect meeting metadata, impose participant limits, and require ongoing subscriptions. Self-hosting your video conferencing infrastructure gives you full control over data, removes artificial caps, and eliminates recurring licensing costs.
